reviews.review_description: it's a copy of catos and the computer is SO SMALL AND YOU STOLED ASSETS I CAN'T SEE ANYTHING SO MAKE OTHER GAMES WITHOUT STOLEN ASSETS so make another playermodel that is not Catos one like who gave you the stealing pass?
Guys this is catos V2 kind of tho

reviews.review_title: Bad game, low quality and stolen asset!!
reviews.review_description: Stolen assets is only the start, theres a ton of stolen ideas too, and come on the name is clearly a knock off of catos!! Just play CatOS and I KNOW you didn't put hard work into this game, creator.
W game, btw I just wanted to be first 3 star review ☺️

reviews.review_title: RIP off of Catos Vr: Multiplayer Horror
reviews.review_description: Several ripped models from catos, ban movement, and sight is really bad.

developer_response.body: stop hating our game, we did nothing wrong with it

reviews.review_description: The whole horror aspect had me scared for my life! Keep up the great work! Im super proud of this horror game!
Don't mind the other reviews saying it's a catos copy . It's only the player model. The rest of the game is original and ngl pretty scary and fun

I know the guy who made Catos for awhile now, ever since he started to create this very silly game, and you decide to come along and steal assets? its honestly kinda upsetting how desperate fangame creators are to get attention and downloads. And you say YOU worked hard? Edward worked 100x harder than you, CatOS is so much better than this game and you will never amount to him. So you better take the game down OR get rid of all assets and stop ripping off CatOS, or im coming for you
That was horrible to say he was probably just trying to remake the game your a horrible person that was mean I hope you fall down the stairs
I like the game but stolen assets
Guys come on catos vr had a new catos vr and they’re making a remake it’s an old version of catos vr guys like people copying gorilla tag is the same as this

reviews.review_title: Honestly one of the best oculus games
reviews.review_description:
I'm a developer myself but with no released titles. I know how much work you have to put in for one of these games. And to make it good like the masterpiece we got here?!?!?! All I can say is great job. I found myself playing this game every time I got on my quest 2.
Who cares if it has a few assets that weren't made by this dev. We developers gotta stick together, especially with what's goin on with unity. But anyway great game 10/10

Didn't You Steal Cato's Assets
AND COPY CATOS?? 
LIKE WHAAAAAAT
The dev just stole the assets from catos just play catos instead of this

developer_response.body: Stop hating on our game, we worked so hard for the game and you're getting mad over player model

reviews.review_description: This game blatantly steals game assets from a game called “Catos Vr: Multiplayer Horror”

developer_response.body: we got idea from crawlvent and cato vr, we don't care

reviews.review_description: The game is great but there is no multiplayer so I deleted it
